title: EssentialGUI
description: A small QoL mod that adds helpful information to enhance your gameplay.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/LOdenDT.png "")

## About EssentialGUI
EssentialGUI is a small mod that adds visual elements to make the player's life much easier. Whether you are an experienced or novice player, you will find EssentialGUI an ally for your adventures! I have not studied programming, this mod is a personal project that I have been developing in my free time.

## Main Features
* While in-game, press **F12 Key** to open EssentialGUI Main Menu.
* Change **Block Outline** color and transparency.
* Client, Player Position and World Information.
* Funny **Slime Chunk** Indicator (only in Singleplayer mode). You can find it at Chunk Information.
* **On-screen Warnings** that covers low health, low hunger, low oxygen and Time Since Last Rest (3 or more days = Phantoms).
* **Pointed Block Information:** get info and advanced properties of any pointed block.
* **Pointed Entity Information:** get info and advanced properties of any pointed entity. Also see entities and other players equipment!
* **On-screen Player Equipment** that shows armor and hands equipment.
* **Advanced Player Stats** with XP, Health, Attack and Enchantment Protection Factor values!
* **Multiplayer Equipment Hud** that shows other players equipment and enchantments!
* On-screen **Shulker Box** and **Bundle contents**.
* Get information about time of day, biome, weather effects and Moon Phases!
* **Extended Item Tooltip** Information: food stats, advanced item durability, **item penalty level** and many more!
* Disable Pumpkin and Vignette **Overlay textures**. Disable rain and snow particles.
* Controls **Status Effects** HUD position and duration.
* **Advanced Furnace**/Smoker/Blast Furnace status and fuel **stats**.
* Bucket of Axolotl **item variants**!
* 22 common **Bucket of Tropical Fish item variants**!
* **Zoom In** by pressing Z Key.
* Increase/Decrease **gamma level** by pressing +/- Keys.
* Toggle **Smooth Lighting** by pressing F9 Key.
* **Night Vision Hack** by pressing F8 Key (use with caution :p).
* Customize the **Inventory Slot Highlight**!
* For a extended list and full explanation of every feature, please head to [EssentialGUI Manual](https://www.reddit.com/r/EssentialGUI/comments/12s2pqx/essentialgui_manual "").

## Requirements
* [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/ "")
* [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api "")

## Modpack Permissions
You are free to distribute EssentialGUI with your modpack. If you do, providing a link to this page is a welcome courtesy.

## Forge
I'm neither interested in porting EssentialGUI to Forge nor older version of Minecraft. Please, don't ask for it. Thanks! :)

## Donations
If you find EssentialGUI useful and appreciate my work, any donation is welcome. You can give me some support at [Paypal](https://www.paypal.me/lordrius "")
